function.message: I could not complete this inbox request because one of the explicitly listed OCR target files does not exist: 50_finance/purchases/_2026_02_06__eur_000022__bill__house_mesh_esp32_topup.md. I made no edits and did not delete the inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Inbox instructions require processing exactly the explicit listed file set; workflow update requires no partial edits when task is not doable.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox task explicitly lists 5 files in 00_inbox/724_next-task.md. Four exist and were read, but the fifth path with leading underscore was not found (read error), and a follow-up search in 50_finance/purchases returned zero matches. Under the inbox-processing completeness rule and 99_system/workflows/inbox-processing-v2-update.md, partial OCR would be invalid, so clarification is required.
